soultalk_footer: Si dabiici ah ula sheekayso qof kasta, meel kasta. Waxaan u turjumnaa waqtiga-dhabta ah si aad diirada u saarto wada sheekeysiga.
made_with_love: Waxaa lagu sameeyay ❤️ Africa iyo Adduunka
type_naturally: Si dabiici ah ugu qor luqadda aad doorbideyso
we_translate_instantly: Waxaan si degdeg ah u turjumnaa
ai_powered_translation: Turjumaad wakhtiga-dhabta ah oo ku shaqeysa AI
messages_arrive_translated: Farriimaha ayaa yimaada iyagoo la turjumay
live_example_text: Cali (Swahili) → "Habari yako?" → Xana (Amxaari) waxay aragtaa: "Sidee tahay?"
connect_across_cultures: Ku xirnaan dhaqamo iyo luqado kala duwan
instant_translation: Turjumaad degdeg ah inta aad sheekaynayso
number_registered_message: Lambarkan wuxuu horey ugu diiwaangashan yahay {{username}}. OTP ayaa loo soo diri doonaa {{email}}.
sending_code_message: Waxaan soo direynaa koodh si aan u xaqiijinno in aad adiga tahay.
otp_resent_message: OTP dib ayaa loo soo diray.
enter_6_digit_code: Geli koodhka 6-digit ee loo soo diray {{email}}
connect_with_people_description: Ku xidhma dad ka soo jeeda dhaqamo iyo luuqado kala duwan. Si dabiici ah ugu sheekayso luqadaada.
connect_with_people_world: Ku xidhma dadka adduunka oo dhan
messages_auto_translate: Farriimahaaga si toos ah ayaa loo turjumaa {{targetLanguage}}
press_enter_to_send: Riix Enter si aad u dirto
ai_instantly_translates_to_language: AI si degdeg ah ayay u turjuntaa {{language}}
logout_confirm_message: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad ka baxdo?
goodbye_message: Waxaan rajeyneynaa inaan mar kale ku aragno!
phone_verified_successfully: Lambarka Taleefanka ayaa si guul leh loo xaqiijiyay
invalid_or_expired_otp: OTP aan sax ahayn ama dhacday
empty_chat_subheading: Ku xidhma qof cusub oo bilow safarkaaga SoulTalk. Wadahadalkaaga macnaha leh ee xiga ayaa ku sugaya!
inspiring_quote_about_connection: Luqadu waa khariidadda wadan. Waxay kuu sheegtaa meesha ay dadkeedu ka yimaadeen iyo meesha ay u socdaan.
settings_subtitle: Xakamee muuqaalka, asturnaanta iyo ikhtiyaarada taageerada.
privacy_section_1_body: Faahfaahinta profile-ka, doorashada luqadda, iyo taariikhda fariimaha ee loo baahan yahay.
privacy_section_2_body: Si aan u bixino chat turjuman, u ilaalino sessions, una hagaajino kalsooni iyo amni.
privacy_section_3_body: Waxaan isticmaalnaa ilaalin farsamo oo macquul ah, balse nidaam 100% khatar-la aan ma jiro.
privacy_section_4_body: Waxaad cusboonaysiin kartaa profile-ka, luqadda, oo aad codsan kartaa taageero adigoo adeegsanaya feedback.
feedback_sent_failed: Dirista fikradda way fashilantay. Fadlan mar kale isku day.
feedback_subtitle: Noo sheeg waxa shaqeynaya iyo waxa loo baahan yahay in la hagaajiyo.
no_chats_yet_hint: Weli ma jiraan chats. Ka bilow wada sheekeysi Discover Souls.
only_people_you_messaged: Kaliya dadka aad hore fariin ugu dirtay.
tap_to_open_chat: Taabo si aad u furto chat-ka
settings_description: Maamul khibradaada, asturnaanta, iyo ikhtiyaarrada taageerada.
privacy_intro: Waxaan ixtiraamnaa asturnaantaada. Siyaasaddan waxay sharxaysaa sida Soultalk u ururiyo, u adeegsado, uguna ilaaliyo xogtaada.
feedback_description: Ma haysaa fikrad ama dhibaato? La wadaag faahfaahinta, waanan hagaajin doonnaa Soultalk.
subject: Mowduuc
subject_placeholder: Cinwaan kooban oo aragti celintaada ah
message_placeholder: Si faahfaahsan u sharax aragti celintaada...
tap_to_view_photo: Taabo si aad u aragto sawirka
